name_cn:
Top-tier factory, full packaging
The most elegant silk bag in the Lady series, in stock!!️
🎀 Sparkling effect💫 exudes a queenly aura💝. No exaggeration, no hype. Heavily purchased and crafted by Zhenpin. Meticulous attention to silk, color, and the placement of every diamond🔎, all for quality🤗. A super versatile piece that goes with everything❤️, a must-have for everyone.
size:17cm
